description: General-purpose popover container with CSS Anchor Positioning. Wraps the native Popover API, binds an anchor element, and re-asserts display:none under VB's cascade layers. Trigger via standard popovertarget attribute.

attributes.name: data-mode
attributes.description: Popover dismissal mode: 'auto' (default, light-dismiss + ESC), 'manual' (script-only), 'hint' (auto with hint-stack semantics).

attributes.name: data-anchor
attributes.description: ID (or CSS selector) of the anchor element to position against. If omitted, the component finds the first element with popovertarget pointing at this pop-over.

attributes.name: data-position
attributes.description: Where to place the popover relative to the anchor. Default: 'bottom'.

attributes.name: data-offset
attributes.description: Gap between popover and anchor, mapped to --size-* tokens. Default: 'xs'.
